channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260318.1)
item.description:
What's New

refactor: extract AXHelper utility, optimize AX queries with lazy loading, cleanup deprecated code

  • Add AXHelper.swift: centralized helper for AX API calls (getString, getStringArray, getRange, getFocusedElement, getWindowTitle)
  • Optimize FocusedElementInfo: lazy-load textValue and windowTitle via closures, reducing AX calls from ~10 to ~6 per snapshot
  • Refactor AppBehaviorDetector: use AXHelper throughout, remove duplicated AX boilerplate
  • Refactor TranslationService: replace raw AX calls with AXHelper helpers
  • Refactor OverlayAppDetector: simplify with AXHelper, rethink cache logic
  • Cleanup VNEngine: remove unused code paths
  • Cleanup DebugViewModel: simplify AX inspection with AXHelper
  • Cleanup AdvancedInjectionMethods, CharacterInjector, ForceAccessibilityManager: reduce boilerplate
  • Cleanup FloatingToolbarPositioning: remove unused imports
  • Bump build version to 20260318.1

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
